title: This is Comic Earth Star's Editorial Staff
overview: Hana wants to run a monthly manga and nothing will stop her, not even lack of experience or knowledge.

title: Everyday Editor
overview: Hana's unorthodox style of editing seems to fit well with the artist Shinobu.

title: Perfect Day for a Gravure Shoot
overview: Hana is doing her best to make the magazine first gravure shoot the best, but it's not going well.

title: Assistant Girls
overview: The first issue of Earth Star is almost ready for the printer, but Shinobu’s manuscript is running late!

title: Photosetting Midnight
overview: The girls learn that, that the right font makes all the difference.

title: Infinite Proofreading
overview: They may have gotten the manga to the printers but it is going to be a long night of proof reading.

title: Impatient Ryoma Road
overview: With a small budget, the team sets out to do a 5 city research trip.

title: Comisuke Planet
overview: Team Earth Star attended their first Comisuke except for the Assistant Editor. She is the legendary...

title: Something Borrowed
overview: Working with a Mangaka can sometimes leave the office feeling crowded.

title: Buy More
overview: An editor, a maid, why not both?

title: We Just Haven't Given Our All Yet
overview: An opening call for aspiring manga artist brings out some unique works.

title: The First Volume
overview: Earth Star’s first collected volume is about to be released, but not without problems!

title: It's Anime Time
overview: An offer for an anime adaptation has been presented to Earth Star!
